queries.question: what is the neighbourhood and street name of the branch that has most employees?
queries.sql:
SELECT b.street_name, neighborhood, COUNT(e.employee_id) AS num_employees
FROM employees e
JOIN branches b ON e.branch_id = b.branch_id
GROUP BY b.branch_id
ORDER BY num_employees DESC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?street_name ?neighborhood (COUNT(?employee_id_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?e a :Employees .
  ?b a :Branches .
  ?e p:hasbranches ?b .
  ?b p:branch_id ?branch_id_g .
  ?b p:street_name ?street_name .
  ?b p:neighborhood ?neighborhood .
  ?e p:employee_id ?employee_id_a .
}
GROUP BY ?branch_id_g ?street_name ?neighborhood
ORDER BY DESC(?agg)

queries.question: what is the street name of the branch that has most employees?
queries.sql:
SELECT b.street_name, COUNT(e.employee_id) AS num_employees
FROM employees e
JOIN branches b ON e.branch_id = b.branch_id
GROUP BY b.branch_id
ORDER BY num_employees DESC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?street_name (COUNT(?employee_id_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?e a :Employees .
  ?b a :Branches .
  ?e p:hasbranches ?b .
  ?b p:branch_id ?branch_id_g .
  ?b p:street_name ?street_name .
  ?e p:employee_id ?employee_id_a .
}
GROUP BY ?branch_id_g ?street_name
ORDER BY DESC(?agg)

queries.question: what is the neighbourhood of the branch managed by David Black
queries.sql: SELECT neighborhood FROM branches WHERE branch_manager = 'David Black'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?neighborhood WHERE {
  ?branches a :Branches .
  ?branches p:neighborhood ?neighborhood .
  ?branches p:branch_manager ?branch_manager_f .
  FILTER(STR(?branch_manager_f) = "David Black")
}

queries.question: what is the neighbourhood of the branch that has most employees?
queries.sql:
SELECT b.neighborhood, COUNT(e.employee_id) AS num_employees
FROM employees e
JOIN branches b ON e.branch_id = b.branch_id
GROUP BY b.branch_id
ORDER BY num_employees DESC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?neighborhood (COUNT(?employee_id_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?e a :Employees .
  ?b a :Branches .
  ?e p:hasbranches ?b .
  ?b p:branch_id ?branch_id_g .
  ?b p:neighborhood ?neighborhood .
  ?e p:employee_id ?employee_id_a .
}
GROUP BY ?branch_id_g ?neighborhood
ORDER BY DESC(?agg)
